# relieffromstay.org

> Free guide to motions for relief from the automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 362(d). Learn when creditors can lift the stay, grounds for relief, and how debtors can respond.

## About

relieffromstay.org explains motions for relief from the automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 362(d). The site covers the four grounds for lifting the stay (cause, lack of equity, single-asset real estate, and serial filing), how creditors file these motions, deadlines for debtor responses, adequate protection requirements, and strategies for opposing relief from stay motions.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://relieffromstay.org/): Complete guide to relief from stay motions -- grounds, creditor procedures, debtor responses, and adequate protection

## Network

Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "relieffromstay.org, Bankruptcy Transparency Network (2026)."
